arguments.content:
{
  "review_period_start": "2026-03-16T09:00:00+08:00",

  "key_achievements": [
    "Completed comprehensive API review meeting with clear decisions on v1 deprecation",
    "Finalized API v2.3.0 versioning strategy including OAuth2 + JWT authentication",
    "Established tiered rate limiting policies (1k free / 10k paid per hour)",
    "Created complete technical documentation suite (weekly report, meeting notes, tech spec, ADR)",
    "Identified and documented technical debt items with prioritized remediation plan",
    "Set clear action items for cross-team coordination (Backend, Frontend, DevOps)"
  ],
  "lessons_learned": [
    "Early stakeholder communication on API deprecations prevents last-minute client migration issues",
    "Cross-functional meetings (Backend + Frontend + DevOps) surface alignment gaps early",
    "Documenting decisions in ADR format creates clear historical context for future reference",
    "Maintaining backward compatibility through transitional versions (v2.2) reduces client friction"
  ],
  "created_at": "2026-03-24T16:00:00+08:00"
}
